title: evolvulus tenuis subsp. sericatus
intro: Evolvulus tenuis subsp. sericatus, also known as the False Dwarf Morning Glory, is a plant species that belongs to the family Convolvulaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Evolvulus tenuis subsp. sericatus include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as potentially aiding in the treatment of various health conditions such as fever and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its roots and leaves are dried and used as a remedy.
